common.tagline: The gift list your loved ones will actually enjoy using

hero.title: Well-organized gifts, surprises kept intact
hero.subtitle: Build your list by pasting product links, share it, and let friends and family reserve — no duplicates, no spoilers.

create.title: Create your list
create.description: Paste a product link: title, photo and price fill in automatically. Everything stays editable.

share.title: Share the link
share.description: One public link. Your loved ones don't need an account to browse the list.

reserve.title: They reserve
reserve.description: A name, an email, done. Anyone can cancel their own reservation at any time.

antiSpoil.title: Anti-spoil by default
antiSpoil.description: You never see who reserved what: the surprise stays intact until the big day. Prefer full visibility? One switch away.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Get a magic link by email — no password needed.
login.error: We couldn't send the link. Check the address and try again.

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.description: We just sent you a sign-in link. It's valid for a few minutes.

dashboard.title: My lists
dashboard.giftsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No gifts yet} one {# gift} other {# gifts}}

empty.title: Create your first list
empty.description: Baby shower, wedding, birthday… it all starts with a list.

listForm.createDescription: Give your list a title — everything else can wait.
listForm.antiSpoilHint: Reserved gifts stay a surprise for you and are hidden from other guests.
listForm.error: Something went wrong. Check the fields and try again.

listEditor.shareDescription: Anyone with this link can browse the list and reserve — no account needed.
listEditor.dangerDescription: Deleting the list also removes its gifts and their reservations.
listEditor.deleteConfirmDescription: “{title}” and all its data will be permanently deleted.

giftForm.prefillPartial: Partial read — complete the missing fields.
giftForm.prefillError: Couldn't read this link. Fill in the details manually.
giftForm.error: Something went wrong. Check the fields and try again.

giftRow.deleteConfirmDescription: “{title}” will be removed from the list, along with any reservation.

publicList.metaDescription: A gift list to share — no duplicates, no spoiled surprises.
publicList.antiSpoilNote: Powered by Hopélà! — reserve a gift, the surprise stays intact.

empty.title: Nothing to see here… yet
empty.description: All gifts are already reserved, or the list is still empty. Come back later!

reserve.title: Reserve “{gift}”
reserve.description: Tell us who you are: you'll receive an email confirmation with a cancellation link.
reserve.emailHint: Only used for confirmation and cancellation. Never shown to anyone.
reserve.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alreadyReserved.title: Too late!
alreadyReserved.description: Someone just reserved this gift. Reload the page to see the updated list.

success.title: Reserved! 🎉
success.description: Check your inbox: the confirmation includes a link to cancel if needed.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist, or no longer does.

cancelPage.title: Cancel my reservation
cancelPage.description: You're about to release “{gift}” from the list “{list}”.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.description: This reservation no longer exists — it may already be cancelled.

done.title: Reservation cancelled
done.description: The gift is available again for other guests.

reservationConfirmed.subject: Reservation confirmed — {giftTitle}
reservationConfirmed.heading: Reservation confirmed 🎁
reservationConfirmed.body: You reserved “{giftTitle}” from the list “{listTitle}”. The gift is now marked as reserved for other guests.
reservationConfirmed.cancelIntro: Change of plans? You can cancel your reservation at any time — this link never expires:
reservationConfirmed.footer: You're receiving this email because this address was used to reserve a gift on Hopélà!.
